subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call raised from the luminous Spot of the Divine Lote-Tree: He is, verily, none other than the Mighty One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء المرتفعه علی البقعه النوراء من السدره المنتهی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
